name: logistics carriers managing 10-20 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 10-20 vehicles, manual tracking of registration and insurance expiration causes operational disruptions. We automate monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Tracking vehicle registration and insurance expiration dates
features: Notification system for upcoming expiration dates
